Discover the Possibilities

1/6

Shower Valve and Trim Options

Choosing the Right Shower Valve

Shower valves regulate the flow and temperature of water into your shower, through the showerhead, tub spout, or other accessories. Remember that when you choose a shower valve system, you can always change the trim when you remodel in the future and keep your style fresh. Learn more about choosing components here.

Complete the Look With Shower Trim

While shower valves do all the work, trim pieces are what you’ll see and use to control water flow and temperature. KOHLER valve trim and handles are available in a range of finishes, like chrome, nickel, brass, and more.

Smart Showering

Kohler smart showering technology can help you create a highly personalized showering experience. Digital valves and control units enable you to configure and control one or more outlets temperature and flow with one clean simplistic user interface.

Need help with bathroom design? Let Kohler design services help plan your dream bathroom. Learn more about KOHLER Bathroom Design.
